rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) has no relation to Educ. Code §37.154, which addresses hazing consent as a defense in criminal prosecutions. The two provisions govern entirely different subject matters.
quote: It is not a defense to prosecution of an offense under this subchapter that the person against whom the hazing was directed consented to or acquiesced in the hazing activity.
_note: No conflict: the rule_text concerns hazing offenses and is wholly unrelated to property tax homestead exemptions.
